connect.tasktemplate.constraints.CfnAbou: Describes constraints that apply to the template fields.

connect.tasktemplate.constraints.Invisib.Description: Lists the fields that are invisible to agents.

connect.tasktemplate.constraints.ReadOnl.Description: Lists the fields that are read-only to agents, and cannot be edited.

connect.tasktemplate.constraints.Require.Description: Lists the fields that are required to be filled by agents.
